title: Settings
subtitle: Configure your KTClaw experience

appearance.title: General
appearance.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically launch KTClaw when you log in

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure your AI model providers and API keys

overview.title: Provider Accounts
overview.description: A summary of the provider accounts and models currently configured.

empty.title: No providers configured
empty.desc: Add an AI provider to start using KTClaw

dialog.title: Add AI Provider
dialog.desc: Configure a new AI model provider
dialog.apiKeyConfigured: An API key is already stored for this provider.
dialog.apiKeyMissing: No API key is stored for this provider yet.
dialog.apiKeyStored: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.
dialog.replaceApiKeyHelp: Leave this field empty if you want to keep the currently stored API key.
dialog.fallbackModelIdsHelp: One model ID per line. These models use the current provider config before falling back to other providers.
dialog.noFallbackOptions: Add another provider first to use it as a fallback target.

toast.minimaxConflict: Cannot add both MiniMax (Global) and MiniMax (CN) providers.

oauth.loginPrompt: This provider requires signing in via your browser.
oauth.browserFlowUnavailable: Browser OAuth is not wired for this provider yet.
oauth.step2: Open the login page in your browser.
oauth.step3: Paste the code to approve access.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.proxyDesc: Route Electron and Gateway traffic through your local proxy client.
gateway.proxyServerHelp: The default proxy for all requests. Bare host:port values default to HTTP.
gateway.proxyHttpServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTP requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyHttpsServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTPS requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyAllServerHelp: Advanced fallback for SOCKS-capable clients and protocols such as Telegram. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyBypassHelp: Semicolon, comma, or newline separated hosts that should connect directly.
gateway.proxyRestartNote: Saving reapplies Electron networking and restarts the Gateway immediately.

updates.title: Updates

status.check: Check for updates to get the latest features

updates.help: When auto-update is enabled, updates are downloaded and installed automatically.

advanced.title: Advanced

transport.label: Gateway Transport Preference
transport.desc: Choose how renderer requests gateway RPC: WebSocket, HTTP proxy, or IPC fallback.

advanced.telemetryDesc: Allow providing anonymous basic usage data to improve KTClaw

developer.title: Developer
developer.consoleDesc: Access the native OpenClaw management interface
developer.consoleNote: Opens the Control UI with gateway token injected
developer.gatewayTokenDesc: Paste this into Control UI settings if prompted
developer.cliDesc: Copy a command to run OpenClaw without modifying PATH.
developer.doctorDesc: Run `openclaw doctor` and inspect the raw diagnostic output.
developer.doctorFixRunFailed: Failed to run OpenClaw doctor fix
developer.wsDiagnosticDesc: Temporarily enable WS/HTTP fallback chain for gateway RPC debugging.
developer.installDetail: This will create ~/.local/bin/openclaw. Ensure ~/.local/bin is on your PATH if you want to run it globally.

overview.title: Split Skills and MCP views
overview.description: Use one tab for built-in skills and another for MCP services KTClaw can call, including runtime, tool discovery, and logs.

skillsCard.title: Installed Native Skills
skillsCard.gatewayWarning: Gateway is disconnected. Connect the Gateway before managing skills.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Manage global appearance, language, and app startup behavior.

model-provider.title: Models & Providers
model-provider.subtitle: Configure the core reasoning engine, bind third-party API keys, and define the global fallback model.

team-role-strategy.title: Team Architecture
team-role-strategy.subtitle: Control how the system derives sub-agents automatically and assigns default roles to different task classes.

channel-advanced.title: Advanced Channel Config
channel-advanced.subtitle: Manage messaging strategy across Feishu, WeCom, Telegram, and other host environments.
channel-advanced.kicker: IM integrations, quiet rules, and routing

automation-defaults.title: Automation Defaults
automation-defaults.subtitle: Define concurrency pools and fault-breaker behavior for unattended workflows such as cron jobs.

memory-knowledge.title: Memory & Knowledge Base
memory-knowledge.subtitle: Manage long-term memory storage, summarization rules, and mounted local knowledge directories.

skills-mcp.title: Skills & MCP Services
skills-mcp.subtitle: Manage internal executors (Skills) and external protocol services (mcp-servers).

tool-permissions.title: Tool Permissions
tool-permissions.subtitle: Strictly define which tools and folders intelligent systems are allowed to modify.

agent-avatars.title: Agent Avatars
agent-avatars.subtitle: Upload custom avatar images for each agent.

migration-backup.title: Migration & Backup
migration-backup.subtitle: Protect configuration from loss or damage and support moving between primary and secondary machines.

auto-update.title: App Updates
auto-update.subtitle: Manage automatic checks and downloads, and review current version and update progress.

feedback-developer.title: Feedback & Developer
feedback-developer.subtitle: Continue to host real tooling such as updates, Doctor diagnostics, and developer mode.

storageOptions.sqlite: Local SQLite + BM25 full-text search (default lightweight option)

contextConsolidation.title: Automatic rolling compression for multi-turn conversations (Context Consolidation)
contextConsolidation.description: When active context exceeds 16k tokens, extract core knowledge into long-term memory and trim the frontend context.

nightlyReflection.title: Nightly Reflection
nightlyReflection.description: During very low overnight load, merge and summarize yesterday's IM interactions into the global profile.

memoryBrowser.selectFile: Select a file on the left to view its content

migrate.title: Migrate from OpenClaw
migrate.description: Automatically detect legacy OpenClaw workspaces on disk and migrate agents, skills, and IM channels without loss.

backup.title: Cold Backup & Export
backup.snapshotTitle: Back up a full snapshot package
backup.snapshotDescription: Bundle settings, encrypted credentials, cron config, and knowledge graph data into a single .ktclaw archive.
backup.importDescription: Useful when moving to a new computer. Selecting a file will require restarting the app. Unsaved data will be lost.

autoBackup.title: Automatic Incremental Backup
autoBackup.itemTitle: Keep a local config history every day (Git-like)
autoBackup.itemDescription: This allows one-click rollback after a bad MCP JSON change. Up to 5 history entries are kept.

hardReset.title: Hard Reset
hardReset.warning: Clear all settings and related agent data... (this action cannot be undone)

header.title: Configuration Migration
header.subtitle: Migrate settings from OpenClaw to KTClaw

skills.label: Skill Config (skills/)
skills.description: Copy the skills/ directory (review custom scripts first)

providers.label: Model Provider Config
providers.description: No custom model providers are available to migrate (zai/zhi…)

plugins.label: Plugins (plugins/)
plugins.description: KTClaw uses a different plugin architecture and cannot migrate them directly

gateway.label: Gateway Config
gateway.description: Gateway architecture differs and cannot be migrated directly

scope.title: Choose Migration Scope
scope.subtitle: Select the configuration items to migrate

confirm.title: Confirm Migration

checklist.copyOnly: Original config is not deleted (copy, not move)

confirm.securityNotice: Security notice: skills/ may contain custom scripts, review them before migrating
confirm.acknowledge: I understand the migration risks and want to continue

brandImageRequired: Please select an image file for the brand asset.
